use_cases: Interactive text effects on landing pages where letters animate based on cursor proximity
Proximity-based typography highlights for creative portfolio sites
Cursor-following text transformations in hero sections
Visual feedback for interactive headings or call-to-action text
Engaging text animations for marketing or presentation materials
ai_summary: TextCursorProximity is an interactive React component that animates individual letters of text based on mouse cursor proximity. Each letter dynamically changes CSS properties like color, scale, or opacity as the cursor approaches, with configurable falloff algorithms (linear, exponential, gaussian) and a customizable radius. The component uses motion/react for smooth animations and integrates with a custom mouse position hook for real-time tracking.
